notes: Fixed quick expenses (and any already-paid occurrence) not deleting: deletion now un-posts the payment first — the transaction disappears and the money returns to the account. Deleting the only occurrence of a one-time item removes the item itself. Undo restores both the transaction and the balance.
Deleting or confirming no longer scrolls the page back to the top — the list keeps its position; switching tabs still starts at the top.
